items.name: AUTH-001: Build Login Form UI
items.description: Create a responsive login form with email and password fields. Include validation states, error messages, and loading indicator on submit.

items.name: AUTH-002: Implement Login API Integration
items.description: Connect login form to authentication API. Handle success, error responses, and store user session token in localStorage.

items.name: AUTH-003: Add Client-side Validation for Login
items.description: Validate email format and ensure password field is not empty before allowing submission. Display inline validation messages.

items.name: AUTH-004: Create Signup Page UI
items.description: Design and build signup form with fields for name, email, password, and confirm password. Ensure responsive layout and accessibility.

items.name: AUTH-005: Implement Password Strength Indicator
items.description: Display visual feedback for password strength based on length, special characters, and complexity rules.

items.name: AUTH-006: Add Remember Me Functionality
items.description: Add a 'Remember Me' checkbox to login form and persist session accordingly using localStorage or cookies.

items.name: AUTH-007: Handle Authentication Errors
items.description: Display user-friendly error messages for incorrect credentials, locked accounts, and server errors.

items.name: AUTH-008: Implement Logout Flow
items.description: Create logout functionality that clears session data and redirects user to login page.

items.name: AUTH-009: Protect Routes with Auth Guard
items.description: Restrict access to protected routes based on authentication status. Redirect unauthenticated users to login.

items.name: AUTH-010: Persist User Session on Refresh
items.description: Ensure user remains logged in after page refresh using stored auth token.
